question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated from sales of books by authors who have written at least two books, considering only sales made to stores in California.

plan.question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated from sales of books by authors who have written at least two books, considering only sales made to stores in California.
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.title_id, leaf_1.title, leaf_1.au_id, leaf_1.au_lname, leaf_1.au_fname, leaf_1.stor_id, leaf_1.city, leaf_1.state, leaf_1.price, leaf_1.qty, leaf_1.total_revenue FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, stores.stor_id, stores.city, stores.state, titles.price, sales.qty, (titles.price * sales.qty) AS total_revenue FROM titles JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id JOIN stores ON sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id WHERE stores.state = 'CA' AND authors.au_id IN (SELECT au_id FROM titleauthor GROUP BY au_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, stores.stor_id, stores.city, stores.state, titles.price, sales.qty, (titles.price * sales.qty) AS total_revenue
where_clauses: authors.au_id IN (SELECT au_id FROM titleauthor GROUP BY au_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)
blocks.notes: Returns detailed information about sales of books by authors who have written at least two books, including store location details and revenue per sale.

steps.sql:
SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, stores.stor_id, stores.city, stores.state, titles.price, sales.qty, (titles.price * sales.qty) AS total_revenue
FROM titles
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN stores ON sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (stores.state = 'CA') AND (authors.au_id IN (SELECT au_id FROM titleauthor GROUP BY au_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2))

build_logs.notes: Calculates the total revenue generated from sales of books by authors who have written at least two books, considering only sales made to stores in California.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, stores.stor_id, stores.city, stores.state, titles.price, sales.qty, (titles.price * sales.qty) AS total_revenue
FROM titles
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN stores ON sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (stores.state = 'CA') AND (authors.au_id IN (SELECT au_id FROM titleauthor GROUP BY au_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2))) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.total_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, stores.stor_id, stores.city, stores.state, titles.price, sales.qty, (titles.price * sales.qty) AS total_revenue
FROM titles
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN stores ON sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (stores.state = 'CA') AND (authors.au_id IN (SELECT au_id FROM titleauthor GROUP BY au_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2))) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(author_count) AS total_authors
FROM (SELECT authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, COUNT(DISTINCT authors.au_id) AS author_count
FROM authors
JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id
JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN stores ON sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id
WHERE (stores.state = 'CA')
GROUP BY authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, stores.state) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.profit) AS total_profit
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_name, titles.title, sales.qty, titles.price, titleauthor.royaltyper, (sales.qty * titles.price * (titleauthor.royaltyper / 100.0)) AS profit
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
WHERE (publishers.pub_id = '1389')
GROUP BY publishers.pub_name, titles.title, sales.qty, titles.price, titleauthor.royaltyper) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total revenue generated from sales in California for authors who have written two or more titles?
